name: Crystal Shards (Major)
description:
Activate A Strike

This flask holds a pressurized red-brown gas flecked with bits of sublimated crystal. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls. When the bomb explodes, it deals ] damage and )[piercing]]{6 piercing splash damage} as the mixture suddenly turns into solid crystals flying at high speeds.

On a hit, the target takes ] damage from the crystals embedded in its flesh. As long as the bleed damage persists, the target also takes a –5-foot penalty to its speed. The target can spend an Interact action to remove the crystals, reducing the DC to stop the bleeding.
